'''modhazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegetarianist|vegetarianist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegetarianist|vegetarianist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| modhazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhazhithi|modhazhithi]] || [[word:modhazhiji|modhazhiji]] || [[word:modhazhishi|modhazhishi]] || [[word:modhazhiki|modhazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhazhuthuthu|modhazhuthuthu]] || [[word:modhazhujuju|modhazhujuju]] || [[word:modhazhushushu|modhazhushushu]] || [[word:modhazhukuku|modhazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhazhuthu|modhazhuthu]] || [[word:modhazhuju|modhazhuju]] || [[word:modhazhushu|modhazhushu]] || [[word:modhazhuku|modhazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhazhufthuf|modhazhufthuf]] || [[word:modhazhufjuf|modhazhufjuf]] || [[word:modhazhufshuf|modhazhufshuf]] || [[word:modhazhufkuf|modhazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhazhethe|modhazhethe]] || [[word:modhazheje|modhazheje]] || [[word:modhazheshe|modhazheshe]] || [[word:modhazheke|modhazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhazhothotho|modhazhothotho]] || [[word:modhazhojojo|modhazhojojo]] || [[word:modhazhoshosho|modhazhoshosho]] || [[word:modhazhokoko|modhazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhazhotho|modhazhotho]] || [[word:modhazhojo|modhazhojo]] || [[word:modhazhosho|modhazhosho]] || [[word:modhazhoko|modhazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhazhofthof|modhazhofthof]] || [[word:modhazhofjof|modhazhofjof]] || [[word:modhazhofshof|modhazhofshof]] || [[word:modhazhofkof|modhazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|modhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhazhĂŠthĂŠ|modhazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:modhazhĂŠjĂŠ|modhazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:modhazhĂŠshĂŠ|modhazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:modhazhĂŠkĂŠ|modhazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhazhathatha|modhazhathatha]] || [[word:modhazhajaja|modhazhajaja]] || [[word:modhazhashasha|modhazhashasha]] || [[word:modhazhakaka|modhazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhazhatha|modhazhatha]] || [[word:modhazhaja|modhazhaja]] || [[word:modhazhasha|modhazhasha]] || [[word:modhazhaka|modhazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhazhafthaf|modhazhafthaf]] || [[word:modhazhafjaf|modhazhafjaf]] || [[word:modhazhafshaf|modhazhafshaf]] || [[word:modhazhafkaf|modhazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:modhazhasha|modhazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhazhshĂ«sha|modhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhazhrosha|modhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhazhmusha|modhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhazhyasha|modhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhazhnkshĂ«sha|gomodhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhazhnkrosha|gomodhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhazhnkmusha|gomodhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhazhnkyasha|gomodhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:modhadhazhasha|modhadhazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhadhazhshĂ«sha|modhadhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhadhazhrosha|modhadhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhadhazhmusha|modhadhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhadhazhyasha|modhadhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhadhazhnkshĂ«sha|gomodhadhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhadhazhnkrosha|gomodhadhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhadhazhnkmusha|gomodhadhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhadhazhnkyasha|gomodhadhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:medhĂŠzhasha|medhĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:medhĂŠzhshĂ«sha|medhĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:medhĂŠzhrosha|medhĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:medhĂŠzhmusha|medhĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:medhĂŠzhyasha|medhĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gomedhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠzhnkrosha|gomedhĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠzhnkmusha|gomedhĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠzhnkyasha|gomedhĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:modhfazhasha|modhfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhfazhshĂ«sha|modhfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhfazhrosha|modhfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhfazhmusha|modhfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhfazhyasha|modhfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhfazhnkshĂ«sha|gomodhfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhfazhnkrosha|gomodhfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhfazhnkmusha|gomodhfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhfazhnkyasha|gomodhfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
